item.title: Fortnite 1V1 With Every Gun (All Codes & Secrets)
item.description:
Fortnite Creative offers a whole host of islands for players to dive into, each with their own unique experiences. However, one of the more popular creations out there has to be 1v1 with Every Gun by Hive, an action-packed map that allows players to 1v1 their friends using a wide variety of weapons. While most weapons in the game can be acquired straight away, many are locked behind secrets. Here is how to get every secret weapon in 1v1 with Every Gun within Fortnite .

Updated by Nathan Round on May 22, 2026: 1v1 With Every Gun is constantly receiving all new secrets, with each one granting players access to some overpowered weapons to take on the competition. This guide has been updated to include every new secret, including the Rainbow Machine Pistol, Pancake LMG, Dice Shotgun, and more.

Retro Sci-Fi Rifle (Upcoming Event)

The Retro Sci-Fi Rifle is an upcoming item that players can get as part of the upcoming Sci-Fi Event. This event will commence on Sunday, May 31, 2026, at 1 PM ET. However, expect a second showing the following day as per usual. We will provide more details on the timing once Team Hive confirm the time for the second showing.

Simply attending this live event will allow you to unlock the Sci-Fi Rifle permanently.

All 1v1 with Every Gun Codes

This first set of secrets can all be unlocked through secret codes entered via the Code Terminal in the main lobby. Here are the specific codes to unlock each secret weapon:

3047333

Lucky Pistol

9000454

Underworld Assault Rifle

153154426

Troll Remote

12252025

Gingerbread SMG (Limited Time)

676767

Galaxy Flint-Knock Pistol

50025

Water Pump Shotgun

76503

Underworld Shotgun (Limited Time)

6525

Storm King Rifle (Limited Time)

60101

Nitro Fists

27911

Tiger Assault Rifle

70025

Business Turret

2025

Firework Flare Gun

Rainbow Machine Pistol

To get the Rainbow Machine Pistol, start by entering the following code into the Secret Code Terminal: 7654321. Doing so will take players to a secret maze.

The goal here is to successfully complete the maze, starting from the Rift and heading to the right , and then making your way to the top left to reach the Rainbow Machine Pistol and claim it. This maze is definitely challenging, so for the correct route to take, see the video attached above.

Pancake LMG

To get the Pancake LMG, first start by heading down the left-hand side of the glass lobby down to the arena. Here, on the row of tiles leading up to the glass platform, exactly 6 tiles up, you can find a pancake. Interact with it to be taken to a secret room.

In this room, you will need to win three matches of Tic-Tac-Toe / Noughts and Crosses against an AI. For those unaware of how to play this game, you will need to place down your shape into a three-by-three grid, taking turns. To score a point, simply manage to get three of your shapes in a row , either vertically, horizontally, or diagonally.

Successfully winning three games will take you back to the main map and award you the Pancake LMG permanently.

Diamond DMR

To get the Diamond DMR, first grab the Mythic Thermal DMR from its Vending Machine. Next, shoot that same Vending Machine to unlock the Diamond DMR permanently.

Dice Shotgun

To get the Dice Shotgun, first start by typing the following code into the Secret Code Terminal: 121277 . Doing so will take you to a secret room.

In this next room, the aim is to throw the provided dice into each cup to make it disappear, repeating the process until there are no more cups left. You will have 3 minutes to do this , and you can hold the aim button when you have each Dice equipped to make it easier.

To accurately get the minigame done within the time limit, try standing directly in front of the cup you are trying to shoot the Dice into, and aiming for the back of each cup to prevent the Dice from bouncing out. For guidance, see the video attached above.

Successfully completing the minigame will take you back to the main lobby and award you the Dice Shotgun.

Toxic Slime Shotgun

To get the Toxic Slime Shotgun, you will first need to have the Toxic Slime Rifle. If you do not already have it, check here for the method. Once you have the Toxic Slime Rifle, grab it and head to the arena. Here, you will need to press the Reset Builds button at all four ramps in the arena. Doing so will permanently unlock the Toxic Slime Shotgun.

Overdrive SMG

The Overdrive SMG has replaced The Machinist’s Lockjaw and thus shares the same unlock method. To get the Overdrive SMG, players will need to get a total of 10,000 eliminations in 1v1 with Every Gun.

Easter Egg Bomb (Limited Time)

To get the Easter Egg Bomb, you will need to find four different Easter Eggs located in many of the other hidden areas used to unlock other secrets. However, this Easter Egg hunt may only be available until the end of April 2026 , so be sure to find it while you can. See below for a rundown of each Easter Egg location:

Easter Egg

Location & How to Find

  • Grab the Night Hawk and shoot the Rift
  • Progress to the third room. You can do this by:
    • Climbing through the chalk board of the first room
    • Run through the bookcase in the upstairs of the second room

  • In the third room, phase through the fridge to find the first Egg

  • Grab the Hop Rock Dualies and shoot the Med Kit
  • Take the first door on your left
  • Rotate 180 degrees left and take the door on your right
  • Collect the Egg just beyond the door

  • Head to the top left corner of the 1v1 arena
  • Head to the tile that is 8 squares and one tile up from the corner (TNT SMG)
  • Press the following buttons to unlock each zone:
    • Button 1: on the minecart to the left of the first area
    • Button 2: On the rock after taking your first right in the second area
    • Button 3: Hug the right wall in the maze in the third area to reach it
    • Button 4: On the rock to the right in the fourth

  • Progress to the locked door to the final area
  • Turn back and run through the window and go towards the minecart to find the third Egg

Credit goes to GamerHexYT for the method below of finding the last Egg:

  • Head to the terminal and ping your location using the map
  • Enter the following code in the terminal to enter the Backrooms: 22257666
  • The egg can be found in the middle of the maze, 2,811 meters away from the code terminal
  • Directions are impossible due to random spawns, so use your ping for guidance

Spring Shotgun

To get the Spring Shotgun, first enter the following code into the code terminal: 777464. Doing so will take players to a new area. Within this area, players will need to cross the river to the boat using the provided lily pads , and then use both the Impulse Grenade and the lily pads to reach land on the other side.

Upon reaching the other side, players will be able to claim the Spring Shotgun to unlock it permanently. For those having trouble completing this puzzle, we have provided a video above for guidance.

First Shot Rifle

To get the First Shot Rifle, start by heading down to the bottom right corner of the main arena. Here, on the wall, directly two tiles from the corner and three tiles up, players can phase through the wall to find a button. Interacting with this button will take you to a new area.

In this new area, while you will be able to see a Vending Machine with the First Shot Rifle, avoid running straight to it. Instead, look upwards, and you will find a glowing pathway which you will need to follow to reach the First Shot Rifle without being eliminated. For more guidance, see the video above.

If you are having difficulty making the jump towards the end of the maze, try marking the spot using a Spray and look forward instead of up to make the jump easier. From here, look up again and continue progressing as normal.

Shadow Sniper

To get the Shadow Sniper, start by entering the following code into the code terminal: 22257666. Upon doing so, you will be taken to a new Backrooms -themed area.

The goal here is to complete a short maze to reach the Shadow Sniper’s Vending Machine. The only problem is that each player will spawn in a different area of the maze, making it impossible to provide exact directions.

However, there is a method. When navigating the maze, look out for a light emanating from the base of a wall. Since the Vending Machine gives off a glow, this means it will be on the other side of that wall. Also, avoid sticking to the sides of the maze, as that tends to lead you back to the rift. For guidance, see the video provided.

TNT SMG

To get the TNT SMG, first start by heading to the top left corner of the 1v1 arena. From here, head to the square that is 8 squares from the corner , and then one square up. Here you can phase through the wall and find a button , which will take you to a new area when interacted with.

Here, players will be taken to a mineshaft escape room, where the goal is to find a series of buttons to unlock the barrier to the next room. We have provided a video above showcasing how to complete this section, but for a quick overview, see below:

  1. The button in the first room can be found on the left, attached to a minecart.
  2. In the next room, take the first right. The button can be found behind the rock. Jump onto the rock and crouch to press it.
  3. Progress forward and take a left into the maze. Here, hug the right wall to reach the button , then hug the left wall to exit the maze.
  4. The next button can be found on the large rock to the right of the fourth room. Simply hop onto the emeralds and then jump up to reach it.
  5. In the fifth room, you will need to find two buttons. These can be found in the following locations:
    1. Head to the wooden mineshaft and climb up through the hole in the roof. If you crouch-walk to the other end, you can find the button on the rock to the left.
    2. The second button can be found in the second door just before the locked barrier. Head inside and then phase through the wall to reach it.

Once you have found all the buttons and unlocked all the barriers, you can find the TNT SMG at the very end of the arena, which can then be collected and unlocked permanently.

Bubble Shotgun

To get the Bubble Shotgun, start by heading to the top-right corner of the arena. Next, build up to the square on the wall that is five squares from the corner and five squares up. Here, you can phase through the wall and find a bubble that you can interact with to be teleported to a new area.

In this new area, players will need to complete a short parkour course , jumping from one bubble to the next to reach the Bubble Shotgun. However, you will need to be quick, as staying on a bubble for too long will cause it to pop , removing the platform and causing you to fall. Simply reach the end of the course to claim the Bubble Shotgun. For more guidance, see the video above.

Royal Hammer

Want to get the Royal Hammer in 1v1 with Every Gun? Start by grabbing The Ageless Champion's Shockwave Hammer and take it to the bottom-left corner of the 1v1 arena. Once there, perform an emote. Doing so will take you to a secret room.

In this room, you will need to complete an Only Up -style parkour minigame , reaching the top by jumping between various objects. At the very top, you can claim the Royal Hammer.

Lovestruck Bow (Limited Time)

To get the Lovestruck Bow, first go ahead and type the following code into the code terminal: 4622102. Doing so will give you Cupid's Crossbow and start a challenge where you will need to get a total of 50 eliminations with any Crossbow.

Since any crossbow counts, the best method to complete this challenge if you are not playing with friends is to use a combination of a shotgun to lower players' health, then finish them off with the Dual Fiend Hunters.

Once you have a total of 50 eliminations with any Crossbow, the Lovestruck Bow will be unlocked. However, hurry, as you only have until February 14 to claim it.

Lightning Shotgun

To get the Lightning Shotgun, you will first need to head to the Thunder Shotgun Vending Machine among all the other Shotguns on the map and hit it with your pickaxe a total of 10 times. Doing so will take you to a new area of the map.

In this new area, players will need to use the provided pistol to shoot a series of targets in an aim training minigame similar to Kovaaks Aim Trainer. Simply hit all the targets and complete four total rounds of the game to be rewarded with the Lightning Shotgun permanently. For more guidance, check out the video above.

Slurp Rifle

To get the Slurp Rifle, first start by grabbing the Lever Action Rifle and taking it to the Slurp Juice Vending Machine. From here, use the gun to shoot the Slurp Juice. Doing so will take you to a new location.

In this new area, players will be tasked with completing a trickshot course by progressing through the provided path and shooting every target. Successfully shooting every target will take you to the Slurp Rifle, which you can then claim to unlock permanently. For more guidance, check out the video above.

Lava Sniper Rifle

To get to the Lava Sniper Rifle, start by heading to the northeast corner of the arena and building up to the fourth tile up on the corner. Here you can find a secret button that will take you to another area upon interacting with it.

Now that you have been transported to a new area, you will need to use the provided Flint-Knock Pistol to complete an Only Up -style minigame , where the goal is to launch yourself up to the provided platforms. Be sure to carry multiple Flint-Knocks, as some of the platforms may require you to use two shots to propel yourself onto them.

Upon reaching the very top, you will find the Lava Sniper Rifle , which can be claimed and unlocked permanently.

Push & Pull

To get the Push & Pull, start by grabbing the Impulse Shotgun and the Anti-Gravity Pistol. If you do not have either item, see below on how to get them. Once you have both items in your inventory, head to the Push & Pull Vending Machine and emote next to it to be taken to a new area.

From here, players will be taken to a parkour course that will require a minimum of two players to complete. The goal is to work as a team by taking turns stepping on buttons to create paths for your teammates to reach different sections, while also avoiding obstacles like deadly lasers. For those who need a rundown on how to complete this course, see the video above.

At the very end of the course, you will find the Push & Pull , which can then be claimed and unlocked permanently.

Impulse Pump Shotgun

To get the Impulse Pump Shotgun, start by grabbing the Chains of Hades and running along the wall on the far north side of the arena , gliding down the other side to find a platform with a fishing spot.

Here, use the Chains of Hades to fish at the fishing spot until you receive the Impulse Pump Shotgun.

Anti-Gravity Pistol

To get the Anti-Gravity Pistol, players can start by grabbing Night Rose's Void Oni Mask via its own vending machine, which is located with the rest of the mobility items and explosive weapons. Next, head to the secret code terminal and input the following code: 819440 .

Upon doing so, players will be teleported to a secret room with a small window at the far side. Using the Void Oni Mask, teleport to the other side of the window by throwing a Void Tear through it. Doing so will take players to another room where the Anti-Gravity Pistol can be found on the other side.

Low-Gravity SMGs

To get the Low-Gravity SMGs, start by grabbing the Low-Gravity Gun from its own Vending Machine. If you do not already have the gun, please see below for instructions on how to claim it. Once you have the weapon in your inventory, take it over to the Dual SMGs Vending Machine and shoot it.

Once this is done, you will be taken to a space parkour course where you will need to use the provided Grapple Gun to reach the very end. Here you will find the Low-Gravity SMGs, which can be claimed by interacting with the item. For those who need guidance on completing the course, see the video above.

Low-Gravity Gun

To get the Low-Gravity Gun, start by grabbing a Hop Flopper, Grappler, and a standard Rocket Launcher , each from their respective vending machines. Once you have all three, head along the outer wall of the arena and stop in the bottom-right corner of the map. Consume the Hop Flopper, look upward, fire the Rocket Launcher, and quickly switch to the Grappler to latch onto the rocket. This will launch you into the air.

Doing so will transport you to a space-themed parkour course. At the end of the course, you’ll find the Low-Gravity Gun. Complete the course and interact with the weapon to unlock it permanently. For those who are looking for guidance on how to complete the course, see the video above.

Take your time with this parkour course, as it is pretty long and difficult to complete. If you fall, you will have to start all over again.

Snow Assault Rifle (Limited Time)

To get the Snow Assault Rifle, start by grabbing the Snowball Launcher from its own Vending Machine and taking it to the Scoped Assault Rifle Vending Machine. Shoot the Scoped Assault Rifle with the Snowball Launcher to unlock the Snow Assault Rifle.

Boogie Bomb (Limited Time)

The Boogie Bomb is back for a limited time in 1v1 With Every Gun. To get it, players will need to head to the dance stage in the main lobby area and emote with 16 total players at the same time. Doing so will unlock the Boogie Bomb for all players.

The Boogie Bombs will only be available for the remainder of 2025 and should be vaulted following New Year's Day.

Infinite Drum Shotgun

The Infinite Drum Shotgun was once a limited-time item, but now players can obtain it by completing a new secret. To get the Infinite Drum Shotgun, head down to the area where you can unlock the Thunderbolts of Zeus. You can reach this area by jumping directly down off the south side of the main lobby and gliding inward toward a secret platform.

Once on this platform, head through the false wall on the left side. Here, players can find a secret code which, when typed into the Secret Code terminal, unlocks the Infinite Drum Shotgun. However, unlike the above Secret Codes, the code for the Infinite Drum Shotgun will be different each game.

Supercharge SMG

The Supercharge SMG is another limited-time item that is now back in 1v1 With Every Gun. To get it, head along the wall of the map to the bottom left corner and drop a level. Next, phase through the fake wall. Here, you can find a code that, when entered into the Secret Code terminal, rewards the Supercharge SMG. However, this code will be different every game.

Santa Revolver (Limited Time)

To get the Santa Revolver, start by collecting the Enhanced Wrecker Revolver from its Vending Machine. Then, take it to the Christmas tree in the main lobby and shoot the white and red present.

Doing so will take players to a snowy maze , where they will need to follow a certain path to reach the Santa Revolver , which you can then interact with to unlock it. We have provided a video above that you can use as guidance, but for more in-depth directions, see below:

  • Take the first left and keep following the provided path.
  • Once you reach the part with two pathways, head right and keep following the path.
  • When you reach another identical section with two pathways, head left and continue forward.
  • Eventually, you will reach another area with two pathways. Head right and keep following the path.
  • Upon reaching the area with several adjacent pathways, take the first right and continue along the path.
  • When you reach another section with two pathways, take a left and keep going.
  • At the next double pathway, take another right and follow the path.
  • You will then come across another double pathway. Head left and continue forward.
  • When you encounter another double pathway, head right to avoid a dead end, then take a left at the following double pathway.
  • Once you reach the final double pathway, take another left. This will lead you directly to the Santa Revolver.

Snail Rifle

To get the Snail Rifle, players can start by inputting the following code into the code terminal: 102299. Upon doing so, players will be given the challenge to get 20 headshot eliminations with any Assault Rifle. If you are playing with a friend, it is often best to have them stand still and farm the eliminations that way. Upon completing the challenge, the Snail Rifle will automatically be unlocked.

Glass Shotgun

While the initial method of getting into the minigame for the Glass Shotgun was removed, players can still obtain it by doing the following. First, grab the Midas Flopper and then pick up the Epic Tactical Shotgun. Next, eat the Midas Flopper to turn the Epic Tactical Shotgun into a Legendary one. From here, while facing south from the main arena, head to the bottom-right corner of the glass area in the main lobby and shoot it with the Shotgun.

Doing so will take players to a Simon Says minigame , where they will need to watch which colored lights light up and then shoot them in that same order, repeating the process as the sequence gets longer, up to 10 times. Completing this minigame rewards players with the Glass Shotgun.

Black Hole Sniper Rifle

To get the Black Hole Sniper Rifle, start by heading to the secret code terminal and entering the following code: 8675309. Doing so will teleport players to a new area where they must complete a glass-bridge-style minigame , jumping across different tiles and avoiding the false ones to reach the other side and collect the Black Hole Sniper Rifle.

The path you need to take is as follows:

  1. Start from the second row on the right and move forward two tiles.
  2. Go right three tiles.
  3. Face forward and move two tiles ahead.
  4. Go right one tile, then face forward again and move three tiles.
  5. Go left two tiles, then back one tile.
  6. Go left one more tile, then back two tiles.
  7. Move left two tiles, then forward four tiles.
  8. Go right one tile, then forward two tiles.
  9. Move right two tiles, then back one tile.
  10. Move right two tiles again, then forward two tiles.

From here, jump across to reach the Black Hole Sniper Rifle and interact with it to claim it.

Rift Revolver

To get the Rift Revolver, start by grabbing the Night Hawk from its vending machine and heading on down to the main 1v1 area. With the Night Hawk, simply aim at the rift back to the spawn area and shoot it. Doing so will teleport players to a new area.

From here, players will need to complete an escape room challenge, where the goal is to find hidden exits across several different rooms. To reach the first room, simply go through the provided doors. The exit to the first room is the chalkboard, which you can hurdle through by sprinting toward it and pressing the jump button.

Head through the door to the second room. From here, head upstairs to the second floor. The exit to this second escape room is the bookshelf upstairs, which you can simply phase through.

Now, progress through the next door to reach the third escape room. Once there, head upstairs and take the first door on your right , then the second door to the bathroom. The exit to this room is the bathroom mirror, which you can phase through by jumping onto the sink, crouching, and walking through the mirror.

Run toward the door to reach the fourth and final escape room. Once inside, immediately head right into the kitchen , go to the stove, and crouch-walk into the stove to phase through. Doing so will lead players to the Rift Revolver, which can then be collected to unlock it permanently.

Neon Sniper

To get the Neon Sniper, start by grabbing the Rail Gun from its vending machine, then head over to the Neon Sniper vending machine and perform an emote. From there, players will be taken to a secret room where they must fall down an open vault in front of them without touching any of the lasers. Touching a laser will eliminate you, but if you avoid them all, you will find the Neon Sniper waiting at the bottom.

Banana Gun

To get the Banana Gun in 1v1 with Every Gun, start by grabbing the Tactical Pistol from its vending machine. Next, take it to the Banana of the Gods vending machine and shoot it. Doing so will teleport you to a new location , where you must complete an obstacle course, avoiding the lasers and bananas, along with ensuring you don't fall off.

At the very end of the course, you will find the Banana Gun, which can be interacted with to unlock it permanently.

Firework Assault Rifle

To obtain the Firework Assault Rifle, start by entering the following code into the code terminal: 202659. Doing so will teleport players to a secret room where they must make their way across a path to reach the other side. The catch is that the path is only visible when the lights are on , disappearing for short periods of time. Be careful not to fall, or you will be eliminated.

At the very end of the path, you will find the Firework Assault Rifle , which can be interacted with to collect.

Pepper SMG

To get the Pepper SMG, start by heading to the code terminal and entering the following code: 36524. From here, players will be teleported into a secret room. The key here is to use the provided Chug Splash to water the plant in the middle of the room. This task will need to be repeated once a day for 7 days.

Once you have watered the plant for 7 days, it will be fully grown, and you can interact with it to permanently unlock the Pepper SMG.

Balloon Pistol

To get the Balloon Pistol, start by grabbing the Mythic Suppressed Pistol from its vending machine. Once done, take it over to the Balloons vending machine and shoot it. Doing so will immediately grant players the Balloon Pistol.

Dragon Shotgun (Limited Time)

To get the Dragon Shotgun, head to the bottom left corner of the map and drop one level. Here, players can phase through a tile in the wall and find a button to interact with , which will take them to a secret area.

From here, players need to find and interact with six different buttons to unlock the area where the Dragon Shotgun can be claimed. The button locations are:

  1. On top of the wooden structure in the center of the first room.
  2. In a basket in the corridor leading from the first room to the second.
  3. Past the basket and into the next room, take a right into another room, then phase through the ceiling to find the third button.
  4. Back in the previous room, take the center door. Instead of using the next door ahead, phase through the wall with the bench in front to the left of the door to find the fourth button.
  5. Exit the wall and take the next door. From here, face the door and mantle onto the second floor. The fifth button is hidden behind a plant to the right.
  6. In the final room, just by the statue, you’ll find the sixth and last button.

Once all six buttons have been activated, you can open the final doorway in the statue room. Inside, you’ll find the Dragon Shotgun and can claim it.

Toxic Slime Rifle

To get the Toxic Slime Rifle, head to the code terminal and input the following code: 33301. This will transport players to a mini-parkour maze, where the goal is to avoid falling into the slime.

To reach the Toxic Slime Rifle, follow the maze and, whenever you reach a fork with two pathways, always take the left path. Players will take a total of three left turns before arriving at the Toxic Slime Rifle, which can then be interacted with to unlock it permanently.

Freeze Sniper Rifle

To get the Freeze Sniper Rifle, players will need to find and collect six different ice cubes hidden throughout various other secret locations. As each ice cube is found, it reveals one digit of a six-digit code. This code, which is unique in every game, must then be entered into the secret code terminal to unlock the Freeze Sniper Rifle.

For a detailed breakdown of each ice cube’s location and how to unlock the Freeze Sniper Rifle, check out our dedicated guide here.

Rainbow Pistol

Getting the Rainbow Pistol is quick and easy. Simply grab the Flint-Knock Pistol and use it to shoot the Heavy Sniper Rifle. Once done, the Rainbow Pistol will be permanently unlocked via its own vending machine.

Grapple Shotgun

To get the Grapple Shotgun, start by purchasing the Epic Heavy Shotgun from its vending machine and taking it to the Epic Grappler. Fire the Heavy Shotgun at the Grappler to get teleported to a hidden room with a toilet inside.

From there, interact with the toilet and keep flushing it until the Grapple Shotgun drops. It may take a few tries, but once it appears, you’ll not only get the weapon, you’ll also permanently unlock its vending machine.

The Golden Gun

To get The Golden Gun, grab Midas' Drum Gun from its dedicated vending machine and use it to shoot the Marksman Six Shooter. This will teleport players to a parkour course. Once they complete the course and reach the other side, they'll find The Golden Gun locked behind a wall. The wall will disappear once the countdown timer in front of it hits zero, which takes a little over an hour. After that, interact with The Golden Gun to permanently unlock it.

Rift Rifle

To get the Rift Rifle, players will need to collaborate with others in the lobby. Begin by walking along the arena’s outer wall and heading to the top-right corner of the map. There, you’ll find a No Dance Sign. If 8 players emote at the sign simultaneously , everyone involved will permanently unlock the Rift Rifle.

Galaxy Grappler

To get the Galaxy Grappler, start by collecting two of Jules' Glider Guns. Once both are in your inventory, head over to the Galaxy Grappler vending machine and perform an emote in front of it. Doing so will grant you the Galaxy Grappler and permanently unlock it.

Heart Assault Rifle

To get the Heart Assault Rifle, first grab Highcard's Havoc Assault Rifle from its dedicated vending machine. Then, use the weapon to shoot the same vending machine it came from. Once done, the Heart Assault Rifle will be permanently unlocked.

Lil'Whip's Special Serve

To get Lil' Whip's Special Serve, walk along the wall to the central arena and head to the bottom left corner of the map. Here, if players emote, they’ll be transported to a parkour course.

While the course can be quite tricky, there’s a quick trick to make it easier. If players bring a Shadow Flopper with them, drop it on the ground, emote, and then quickly pick it up and consume it while the screen fades to black, they can easily skip large portions of the course. At the very end, players will find Lil' Whip's Special Serve , which can be interacted with to permanently unlock it.

Plasma Cannon

The Plasma Cannon is the next weapon that players can get their hands on. To get it, head over to the far north side of the map by walking along the wall of the main arena or simply building up to it. Once there, players can jump off and find the Plasma Cannon on a small platform outside the wall. Interacting with it will give players the Plasma Cannon right away and unlock it via the vending machine.

Infinite Minigun

Another weapon that players can get is the Infinite Minigun. To get it, first grab Brutus' Minigun from its vending machine within the Assault Rifle section of the weapon selection lobby. Once done, head on over to the far northwestern corner of the island. Here, players can find a prompt to interact with while having the Minigun in hand.

Once done, players will be taken to a glass bridge mini-game. Those who have seen the popular Netflix show Squid Game may be familiar with this mini-game. The key is to reach the other side by jumping onto different glass platforms , with players having to take a gamble on each jump, as only one platform in each row will hold, while the other will break.

While the path that players must take can change between matches, the false platforms will always remain the same in the current match the player is in. So, take note of which direction was taken until the point the player reaches a false platform.

Upon completing the glass bridge mini-game, players should make it to the other side to find the Infinite Minigun. Interacting with it will give it to the player, and also unlock the vending machine needed to claim it in future runs.

Bottle Rockets

To get the Bottle Rockets, players will first need to have a Firework Flare Gun in hand. Once this is done, they can head over to the Check Stats button located just in front of all the secret weapon vending machines.

Pressing this button while holding the Firework Flare Gun will initiate a mini-game, where players must stop a rotating white line on the small green section of a red circle three times in a row. The white line increases in speed with each successful attempt, which can make the game a little tricky.

Upon completing the mini-game, players will automatically receive the Bottle Rockets and can also claim them from their dedicated vending machine at any time.

Fill up your inventory with Firework Flare Guns for multiple tries, as each time you fail, you will lose the one you have currently equipped.

Quad Launcher

Getting the Quad Launcher in 1v1 With Every Gun is a quick task. To unlock it, players need to head over to the Rocket Launcher vending machine, claim a Rocket Launcher , and then fire it directly at the Rocket Launcher’s own vending machine. Doing so will instantly reward the player with the Quad Launcher, which can then also be claimed freely from its vending machine at any time afterward.

Infinity Blade

Next up is the Infinity Blade, which players can unlock relatively quickly. To get it, first grab the Thorn's Vampiric Blade from its vending machine, located among the group of vending machines marked by a Shockwave Grenade. Once players have Thorn's Vampiric Blade equipped, simply emote in front of the Infinity Blade vending machine. Doing so will grant the player the Infinity Blade and permanently unlock the vending machine, allowing players to claim it again at any time.

Mythic Goldfish

To get the Mythic Goldfish, players will first need to grab Impulse Grenades from their designated vending machine, located among the group of vending machines marked by a Shockwave Grenade. Next, head over to the group of vending machines marked by a Slurp Potion and throw an Impulse Grenade at the Midas Flopper vending machine. Doing so will grant players the Mythic Goldfish and unlock its vending machine for future access.

Shield Breaker EMP

To get the Shield Breaker EMP, players will first need to obtain a Mythic Goldfish. Once they have a Mythic Goldfish in hand, they'll need to locate the Shield Potion vending machine, which is found among the group of vending machines underneath a Slurp Potion. Throwing the Mythic Goldfish at the Shield Potion will grant players a Shield Breaker EMP and unlock its vending machine for future use.

Thunderbolt of Zeus

To get the Thunderbolt of Zeus, run off the edge of the map directly in front of the locked weapon vending machines and turn back towards the map. Here, players should find a platform where they can grab the Thunderbolt of Zeus , thus also unlocking its dedicated vending machine.

Chains of Hades

To get the Chains of Hades, players will need to grab both the Thunderbolt of Zeus and the Hades' Modular Harbinger SMG. Once players have both items in their inventory, they can emote in front of the Chains of Hades vending machine , thus unlocking the Chains of Hades.

Ceiling Zapper & Wall Dynamo Traps

Once players have the Thunderbolt of Zeus, they can use it to get both the Ceiling Zapper and Wall Dynamo Traps. To get them, simply use the Thunderbolt of Zeus on the Ceiling Zapper vending machine. Doing so will drop both traps, along with unlocking the ability to claim them straight from the vending machine.

Diamond Drum Gun

To get the Diamond Drum Gun, players will need to type the following code into the secret code terminal: 5032 . Once done, players will be teleported into a secret room with a vault at the end. Simply break open this vault and then head inside to find the Diamond Drum Gun. Interacting with it will allow players to loot it, as well as unlock its vending machine for future use.

Octane & The Machinist’s Lockjaw

To unlock both the Octane and The Machinist’s Lockjaw, players will need to get a certain number of eliminations in 1v1 With Every Gun. The Octane requires 1,000 eliminations , whereas The Machinist’s Lockjaw requires a whopping 10,000 eliminations.

Rainbow Shotgun

To get the Rainbow Shotgun, players will first need to grab a Combat Shotgun and fire it at its own vending machine. Doing so will teleport players to a room with three statues. The trick here is to turn each statue a specific number of times. To solve this puzzle, do the following:

  1. Turn the first statue three times
  2. Turn the second statue four times
  3. Turn the third statue five times

Upon doing so, players will return to the main map and have unlocked the Rainbow Shotgun for future use.

Tech Revolver

To get the Tech Revolver, players should first grab the Ageless Champion's Shockwave Hammer from its vending machine. Next, head to the southeast corner of the map by walking along the wall to the main arena, and then drop one level.

Here, players will be able to phase through the wall and complete a small minigame , where they will need to pass through a series of correct colors to avoid being eliminated. The correct path is as follows:

  1. Red
  2. Blue
  3. Yellow
  4. Yellow
  5. Red
  6. Yellow

Once complete, players will find the Tech Revolver at the end, and interacting with it will unlock the weapon and its vending machine. Be sure to hold onto the Shockwave Hammer to collect the next weapon.

Boom Box

The Boom Box can be found within the same area as the Vindertech Blaster. Head to the same area with the Shockwave Hammer and use its slam attack to knock down the wall just behind the weapon. From here, progress to the far end of the tunnel and take a left to find the Boom Box. Along the way, players will also find a part for the Rainbow Sniper Rifle.

Rainbow Sniper Rifle (Currently Unavailable)

Part #1 Location

To get the Rainbow Sniper Rifle, players will need to collect a total of four different parts. The first part can be found in the same area as the Tech Revolver. Simply take the Shockwave Hammer and use its slam attack to knock down the wall just behind the previous weapon. Doing so will reveal the first Rainbow Sniper Rifle part at the far end of the now accessible tunnel.

Part #2 Location

The second part can be found within the same vault as the Diamond Drum Gun. As before, head to the secret code terminal and input the code: 5032. Then, break down the vault—the piece will be sitting just to the left of the vault's entrance.

Part #3 Location

The next part can be found within a maze, the entrance of which can be found in the wall on the far west side of the arena , just one level down from the top of the wall. Here, players can phase through a wall and then interact with an emoji to be taken to the maze. Once in the maze, take the following directions to reach the third part of the Rainbow Sniper Rifle:

  1. Take a left, carry on, and take another left.
  2. Take a right, then another right, and then a left.
  3. Head right, then take the second right, and then a left.
  4. Take another left, turn right, then take the second left passageway.
  5. Take two more lefts, then a right, then five consecutive lefts.
  6. Head right and then take the next four lefts.
  7. Head right, then left, left again, and then right.
  8. Take the left and then a final right.

Part #4 Location

The final part of the Rainbow Sniper Rifle can be found within the very same maze , so go ahead and enter it the same way as before. This time, players need to take the following directions to reach it:

  1. Take the second left, another left, and then turn right.
  2. Take the second available left, another left, and then turn right.
  3. Take the next three lefts, then a right, then two more lefts.
  4. Finally, take a right, and then another two lefts.

Once players have found the final part, they will be taken back to the main island. From here, grab a Rare Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle and shoot the Heavy Sniper Rifle vending machine with it. Doing so will take players to a secret room, where they can claim the Rainbow Sniper Rifle, thus unlocking its very own vending machine.

Sheriff Pistol

To get the Sheriff Pistol, head back to the same maze and take the following directions:

  1. Take two lefts and then two rights.
  2. Take the next left, then a right, and then the second right.
  3. Take two lefts, followed by a right, and then take the second left.
  4. Take two more lefts and then a right.
  5. Take four consecutive lefts, followed by two rights.
  6. Finally, take the next two lefts.

Here, players will find a vending machine where they can unlock the Mammoth Pistol.

The directions provided for the maze above only specify turns when multiple paths are available. Credit goes to Viza on YouTube for mapping out the maze.

Event Reward Items (All Limited-Time)

These next few items are, unfortunately, only available for a limited time, meaning that they can only be accessed through a small window. Such items are often only obtainable by attending one of 1v1 With Every Gun’s Live Events , which generally only go live once at 12 PM ET on specific dates. For the latest upcoming event, see the very first heading in this guide.

These events are often teased in-game via a countdown timer , and if you miss the event, the items tied to it cannot be unlocked again. Here is a rundown of all the Event Reward items in 1v1 With Every Gun:

  • Neon Rifle: Provided to those who experienced a saved-data wipe as compensation.
  • Ice Cream Cones: Available for the Summer Event
  • Easter Burst Rifle: Unlocked during the Easter 2025 Event
  • Cuddle Fish: Unlocked during the Valentine's Day 2025 Event
  • Birthday Launcher: Unlocked during 1v1's Third Birthday Celebration Event
  • Storm King Rifle: Unlocked for a limited time by entering a secret code
  • Underworld Shotgun: Unlocked for a limited time by entering a secret code
  • Xeno SMG: Unlocked during the Alien Earth Event
  • Underworld SMG: Unlocked from the Underworld Live Event
  • Supercharge Shotgun: Unlocked during the Supercharge Live Event
  • Pumpkin Shotgun: Unlocked by completing a puzzle during the Halloween 2025 Event
  • Ghost SMG: Unlocked by completing a puzzle during the Halloween 2025 Event
  • Dark Magic Assault Rifle: Unlocked through the Witching Hour Live Event
  • Corrupted Rifted Rifle: Unlocked through the Corruption Event
  • Pumpkin Pie Launcher: Unlocked through the Thanksgiving 2025 Event
  • Christmas Pump Shotgun: Unlocked through the Christmas 2025 Event
  • Boogie Bomb: Unlocked at the Dance Stage until New Year's Day
  • Arcade Pistol: Unlocked through the Arcade Mini-Event
  • Retro Sci-Fi Rifle: Unlocked through the Sci-Fi Event.

Ballistic Items & Armored Walls

The Ballistic Items and Armored Walls can only be acquired by those who apply to receive them via Team Hive's Discord. As of the time of writing, the requirement to be eligible to unlock each item is to have 5,000 followers on any social media platform.

Admin Remote, Junk Rifts, & Air Strike (Admin Only Items)

These elusive items are unfortunately unavailable for the average player and are only reserved for Admins at Team Hype. This means that players cannot obtain them as of the time of writing. Team Hype has also requested that users do not ask for access to the Admin Remote via their Discord.

However, if players head to the Admin Remote, they’ll be directed to the Aimbot 1v1 With Every Gun Creative Map, where the Admin Remote will be unlocked for everyone. You can also load into this map directly using the following map code: 0656-4410-5459.

To play 1v1 With Every Gun, simply use the map code: 6155-1398-4059. Once you're in, you’ll have access to a wide variety of weapons to duel it out. Also, don’t forget to favorite Team Hive to easily explore more of their awesome Creative maps. One last note, this guide will be constantly updated as new weapons are released. To stay up to date, be sure to visit this guide whenever a new weapon is added to 1v1 with Every Gun.

Fortnite
Released
September 26, 2017

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Developer(s)
Epic Games
Genre(s)
Survival, Battle Royale, Shooter, Action, Adventure
Platform(s)
PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, PC, Android, iOS
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
7 Images
